scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/gen && cp src/gen/*.js dist/gen/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp src/gen/*.d.ts dist/gen/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.gen:cp_sat: mkdir -p src/gen && pbjs -t static-module -w commonjs -p /workspace -o src/gen/cp_sat.js ortools/sat/cp_model.proto ortools/sat/sat_parameters.proto ortools/util/optional_boolean.proto && pbts -o src/gen/cp_sat.d.ts src/gen/cp_sat.js
scripts.prepare: npm run gen:cp_sat && npm run build
